metadata.method: Manual MVP curation based on official product positioning, availability, category fit, beginner usefulness, and repeat-work value.
metadata.scoreMeaning: 0-100 score estimating whether a tool is worth recommending to busy users.

chatgpt.bestPaidUse: General work assistant, writing, analysis, coding help, and everyday productivity.

claude.bestPaidUse: Long-form writing, document analysis, coding support, and thoughtful reasoning.

perplexity.bestPaidUse: Fast research with cited sources and current information discovery.

cursor.bestPaidUse: AI coding inside a developer editor for building and refactoring real projects.

lovable.bestPaidUse: Turning app ideas into working web apps quickly without heavy setup.

bolt.bestPaidUse: Browser-based app prototyping and quick frontend/backend experiments.

canva_design.bestPaidUse: Visual content, social posts, brand assets, presentations, and simple marketing material.

looka.bestPaidUse: Quick logo concepts, brand kits, and small-business visual identity.

kittl.bestPaidUse: Social media graphics, merch designs, posters, and template-based brand visuals.

figma.bestPaidUse: Professional UI design, wireframes, prototypes, and product design collaboration.

capcut.bestPaidUse: Short-form video editing, captions, templates, and creator marketing videos.

runway.bestPaidUse: AI video generation and advanced creative video workflows.

gamma.bestPaidUse: Fast presentations, pitch decks, reports, and polished shareable docs.

elevenlabs.bestPaidUse: Realistic AI voiceovers, narration, dubbing, and creator audio.

suno.bestPaidUse: Generating songs, jingles, music ideas, and social audio experiments.

zapier.bestPaidUse: Automating repeat tasks across business apps without code.

make.bestPaidUse: Visual workflow automation for users who need more control than basic zaps.

notebooklm.bestPaidUse: Learning from documents, summarizing notes, and research synthesis.

ideogram.bestPaidUse: Image generation with text, posters, logos, and social graphics.

midjourney.bestPaidUse: High-quality artistic and commercial image generation.

grammarly.bestPaidUse: Polishing writing, emails, tone, grammar, and professional communication.

replit.bestPaidUse: Coding, deploying small apps, and learning programming in one workspace.
